title: euphrasia mollis
intro: Euphrasia mollis, also known as the woodland eye or low-growing eyebright, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia mollis include its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe irritated eyes, as well as alleviate symptoms of hay fever and allergies. Euphrasia mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
